content.rendered:
Reporting and Analytics: Make more informed decisions.

With our comprehensive reporting services, you’ll always know how your marketing campaigns are performing.

LET’S TALK

We design your reports with as much care as your campaigns.

At Nowspeed, the measure of success is how well we meet the goals we define in the planning stages of each campaign or deliverable. We start out by setting SMART goals-goals that are specific, measurable, attainable, relevant, and time-bound.
Well-designed reports tell you and our marketing team how well we did in meeting those goals, ensuring that we are always working towards closing the gap between where we are, and where we want to be. Each KPI (key performance indicator) will come together to tell more about that story, depending on the campaign medium.

Our reports help you make informed snap decisions.

For your website analytics, conversion details, search performance, email campaigns, backlinks, and any other custom data you need, you’ll have 24/7 access to an easy-to-read dashboard that pulls in measurements from the entirety of your marketing plan. You will be able to access, compare and export any time-period of data on demand-all in one place.

Armed with reporting and analytics data, we can help you make better, more informed decisions to continuously optimize your campaigns, test new marketing ideas against controls, and ultimately outperform prior performance.

We don’t use one-size-fits-all reporting.

We choose the KPIs to track depending on the campaign, the medium, and the goal. Examples of KPIs include traffic, engagement, click-through rate (CTR), open rate, new leads, new contacts, conversion rate, cost-per-result, impressions, shares, and so much more. We can track across any time period to measure how different actions affect our results.

We make analytics data easier to understand, and more actionable.

Marketing agencies either don’t measure their performance, or they flood their clients with too much data. Our approach is to strategically identify whether we-and your other vendors-meet specific goals, and provide clear, accessible explanations along the way. That’s how we optimize every campaign.

You’ll gain a better understanding of your marketing strategy and performance, because we walk you through the data and our strategy in easy-to-understand language.

GET A QUOTE FOR DIGITAL MARKETING SERVICES

Nowspeed can create an integrated digital marketing program to drive results for your company.

GET A QUOTE

Have Questions About Our Reporting and Analytics Services?

We want to make sure you’re as informed as possible so you can make a great decision on what marketing company is best for you. Below is our FAQ about our process, details and more.

Does reporting cost extra at Nowspeed?

Reporting is a standard part of Nowspeed’s marketing service! We believe streamlined, transparent reporting is the best way to make informed decisions and ensure there is a return on investment for each campaign.

Can I delegate reporting to other staff members in my company?

Yes, we’ll work with you to decide not only who in your company should see reports, but also how often, and what data they can access. Your chosen employees can also be included in strategy sessions in which we go through the data and what it means.

Do you keep old reports on file?

Once we set up reporting, we are able to pull data from any time period going forward.

How often can I receive reports?

Most reports are available 24/7. We can set up reports to be emailed to you on a recurring basis (weekly, monthly, quarterly, etc.), and follow up with a strategy call.

In what formats can reporting data be exported?

You will receive a link to your online dashboard, where reports can be exported in several formats, including .csv and pdf. Narrative reports will be sent to you via email, and we are always available to address any questions you may have.

So let’s
talk.

We’re always excited to dig into the details of your company and what strategy can help you meet your goals. So let’s talk and lay out a plan for success!

CONTACT US
